report.summary: Community growth cycle v14 (Mar 16): PayFi guide + PayFiYieldCalculator launch as new lead angle; GENIUS Act / PayFi regulatory thread drafted (6 posts); newsletter updated with PayFi section and 3 new subject line variants; FOMC-day PayFi tweet added; 1 new SVG social card created (social-payfi-guide-2026.svg); full posting schedule updated through Friday Mar 20.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Mon Mar 16): PayFi Guide 2026 launch — '$2.27B sector most people haven't heard of'; Huma $10B+, $148M daily volume hook; CTA to /learn/payfi-guide
Tweet (Mon Mar 16): PayFiYieldCalculator teaser — 'How much can you earn letting Huma Finance settle your payments?'; protocol list with APYs; CTA to /learn/payfi-guide
Discord/Telegram (Mon Mar 16): PayFi guide drop — full protocol list, calculator feature breakdown, 5 APY options, direct URL

Twitter thread (Tue Mar 17, 6 posts): PayFi + GENIUS Act connection — 'bill bans issuer yield, PayFi protocols exempt'; Huma as proof; GENIUS Act actually funnels yield-seekers into PayFi rails; April 15 tax + Pectra convergence angle; CTAs to both guides
Tweet (Wed Mar 18): PayFi / FOMC angle — 'Fed holds or cuts, either way PayFi wins'; stablecoin yield alternatives narrative
Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): Updated with PayFi section in 'New on degen0x'; 3 new subject lines including PayFi angle; Degen Corner updated with GENIUS Act + PayFi + Pectra convergence hot take
Community poll (Fri Mar 20): Sprint 59 options updated to include 'On-chain yield tools (PayFi, lending rates)' as 4th option

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-payfi-guide-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: right-side PayFiYieldCalculator preview panel ($10K capital, Huma 10% APY, $83.33/mo, $1,000/yr, $6,105 5yr compound); left-side hero title 'PayFi Guide 2026' with brand gradient; 3 stat cards ($2.27B sector, $10B+ Huma volume, $148M daily flows); protocol strip footer; NEW badge; brand gradient top bar. Saved to /public/social-payfi-guide-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 16 — GSC organic signals arriving imminently (day 14-21 window); PayFi guide is perfectly positioned as a trending March 2026 narrative with low competition

GENIUS Act + PayFi regulatory angle is highly differentiated — most crypto content covers GENIUS Act in isolation; our PayFi thread makes the connection between the bill and PayFi growth explicitly, creating a unique take
FOMC week (Fed meeting Wed Mar 18) creates dual urgency: DCA + Fear&Greed tools for vol trading + PayFi/stablecoin yield as alternative narrative regardless of rate outcome
April 15 US tax deadline: 29 days away — peak search intent for 'crypto tax 2026' continuing to build; tax guide CTA in every post
Ethereum Pectra: 22 days to April 10 mainnet — countdown urgency increasing daily; EIP-7702 smart accounts angle most differentiated in our content stable
Sprint 59 poll options updated to include PayFi/yield tools — community signal for next sprint planning
